---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for mouseferry
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What is the situation you run into today? What does it stop you from doing?

## Proposed solution

How would you like `mouseferry` to behave?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they are not enough.

## Scope check

- [ ] The feature is useful to more than just my specific setup.
- [ ] It does not require `mouseferry` to become a daemon / service / GUI application.
- [ ] It stays compatible with the PolyForm Noncommercial license.
